title: WERNNSAI Farm Party Napkin Decorations - 50PCS Farm Animals Birthday Paper Napkins Disposable Barnyard Farm Party Decoration Supplies for Kids Baby Shower Farm Animal Party Picnic
features: FARM THEMED DESIGN : Make your party or event full of fun and energy! Decorated with cute farm animals such as barns, cows, pigs, and sheep, these paper towels add fun and color to your tabletop

MATERIAL : Our paper towels are made from 3 layers of virgin wood pulp paper, ensuring softness and absorbency. Non-toxic and harmless materials allow you to use it with confidence, ensuring the health and safety of you and your family

PACKING LIST : Each order includes 50 farm-themed paper towels measuring 13''x13'', enough to meet your needs for many occasions. Whether it's a family gathering, a birthday party or a corporate event, these tissues provide you with convenience and functionality

BEAUTIFUL PACKAGING : We carefully package each order to ensure the product remains intact during shipping. This also makes it ideal for gifting, allowing you to share these cute and practical farm-themed tissues with family and friends

MULTIPLE USES : In addition to being used at parties and events, these paper towels can also be used for cleaning and wiping in daily life. Their versatility makes them a practical item to have in your home
description: Make these adorable farm-themed tissue paper the centerpiece of your table at your next party or event! We bring you this beautifully designed tissue paper that makes adorable farm animals such as barns, cows, pigs and sheep come to life at your occasion, bringing endless fun and surprise to your guests.
